query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `studio_guests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `session_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_id` int,
  `guest_name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `guest_email` varchar(255),
  `guest_avatar` text,
  `platform` enum('internal','youtube','twitch','zoom','discord','twitter_spaces','custom') DEFAULT 'internal' NOT NULL,
  `platform_handle` varchar(255),
  `role` enum('host','co_host','panelist','guest','moderator','speaker','attendee') DEFAULT 'guest' NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('invited','accepted','declined','waiting','connected','on_air','muted','disconnected') DEFAULT 'invited' NOT NULL,
  `invite_token` varchar(64),
  `joined_at` bigint,
  `left_at` bigint,
  `is_muted` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `is_video_on` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `is_screen_sharing` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `speaking_order` int,
  `bio` text,
  `created_at` bigint NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (`session_id`) REFERENCES `studio_sessions`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
